name: l2_static_airframe_coefficient_seed
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeCoefficientSeed normalizes compact static-airframe L2 force/moment summaries into dimensionless coefficient seeds.
note: Reference surface for static-airframe coefficient seed fitting.

name: l2_static_airframe_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeRunMatrix supplies the compact reflected L2 run summaries used as coefficient inputs.
note: Reference surface for static-airframe coefficient seed fitting.

name: l2_drone_probe_geometry
value: Aerodynamics4McL2DroneProbeAudit supplies body half extents rotor span and inlet vectors used as coefficient reference scales.
note: Reference surface for static-airframe coefficient seed fitting.

name: drone_physics_airframe
value: DronePhysics owns the gameplay airframe force model that future live calibrated coefficients may inform after validation.
note: Reference surface for static-airframe coefficient seed fitting.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live L2 wind-tunnel force/moment coefficient fitting.
note: Reference surface for static-airframe coefficient seed fitting.

name: coefficient_seed
value: Coefficient seed normalizes static-airframe L2 force/moment summaries for comparison; do not treat test-runtime values as calibrated gameplay coefficients.
note: Reference area is the Java drone-probe body ellipsoid frontal area pi*bodyHalfX*bodyHalfY and reference length is rotor span.
